basic_details.job_title: NHM Solapur Cardiologist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Health Mission Solapur (NHM Solapur) Cardiologist Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NHM Solapur. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NHM Solapur Cardiologist Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.zpsolapur.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NHM Solapur Cardiologist Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download NHM Solapur Cardiologist Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NHM Solapur Cardiologist Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NHM Solapur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NHM Solapur Cardiologist Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NHM Solapur Cardiologist Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.zpsolapur.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NHM Solapur Cardiologist Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NHM Solapur Cardiologist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Cardiologist post is 08th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Cardiologist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Cardiologist post announced by NHM Solapur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Cardiologist position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a DM Cardiology qualification to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Cardiologist role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 1,25,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NHM Solapur Cardiologist job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply offline by submitting the application form to the designated address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the Cardiologist post?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 150/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 100/- for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website www.zpsolapur.gov.in.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the Cardiologist position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of NHM Solapur?
faq.answer: The official website for NHM Solapur is www.zpsolapur.gov.in.
